context: Tests whether the agent correctly scopes all product queries to a Saleor channel, implements cursor-based pagination, sets CDN cache headers on catalog routes, uses an appropriate GraphQL client, adds typed queries via codegen, and authenticates Admin API calls with a Bearer token.

checklist.name: Channel parameter required
checklist.description: The products GraphQL query declares $channel as a required variable (e.g., `$channel: String!`) and passes it to the products() call

checklist.name: Channel value supplied
checklist.description: The fetchAllProducts function accepts a channel argument and passes it when executing the query — does NOT hardcode 'default-channel' or omit the channel

checklist.name: Cursor pagination loop
checklist.description: fetchAllProducts uses a loop (do/while or while) that checks pageInfo.hasNextPage and passes pageInfo.endCursor as the `after` variable on subsequent requests

checklist.name: pageInfo fields requested
checklist.description: The products query includes `pageInfo { hasNextPage endCursor }` in the selection set

checklist.name: GraphQL client library used
checklist.description: The client in lib/saleorClient.ts uses one of: urql (createClient), graphql-request (GraphQLClient), or Apollo Client — does NOT use raw fetch() with manual JSON stringification

checklist.name: Authorization Bearer header
checklist.description: The GraphQL client or individual requests include an `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header (reading the token from an environment variable)

checklist.name: Cache-Control header set
checklist.description: pages/api/catalog.ts sets a Cache-Control header with `s-maxage=300` (or a value including `s-maxage`) on the response

checklist.name: TypeScript types for queries
checklist.description: The code includes either a graphql-codegen config file OR explicit TypeScript interfaces/types for the product query response — queries are NOT typed as `any`

checklist.name: Environment variable for API URL
checklist.description: The Saleor API URL is read from an environment variable (NEXT_PUBLIC_SALEOR_API_URL or similar) — not hardcoded as a string literal

checklist.name: urql Content-Type header
checklist.description: If urql is used, the createClient fetchOptions includes `'Content-Type': 'application/json'` in the headers

checklist.name: No offset-based pagination
checklist.description: The pagination implementation does NOT use offset/skip-based pagination — only cursor-based (after + endCursor) is used
